commit_scope: Add package/install receipt evidence around the Mac + Android native core-axiom binary pair.

commands: coord claim core-axiom-package-receipt "Next narrow lane after PR #3174: add package/install receipt around Mac+Android core-axiom native pair with binary/source checksums, adb-forward channel timing, and remote cleanup proof; avoid sensor/mesh/BML/compiler lanes."
local_validation.notes: The live package receipt on authorized SM-S918U1 Android 16 arm64-v8a wrote kind=core-axiom-native-package-receipt, script_sha256=76e00a1138f4bb45192489e0364d4cd162d38e1af3b96b3ef8bd707083ebd74d, generated_source_sha256=8824952e790b987ec493223e160af7e96f4b590cda994441d166869c84042102, mac_binary_sha256=ce2fdfa61194819de0909383264a0ca67c0fc6d3b687fda8684352bad1839dd8, android_binary_sha256=d3829aa99d113037ad5c51f88f0d7224559c6d39e8dfb15349e8cb2e94b3b2a7, channel_receipt_sha256=0888365fb840a81ea677616760ad2a341529aad6d1301881c967636b089df79a, channel_duration_ms=156, samples=2048, width=8, remote_cleanup=pass, status=pass. Focused Form validation returned 4095 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent. fourth-arm-gate returned PASS-4WAY core-axiom-package-receipt.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.summary: No public deploy requested; this is a local Mac + authorized Android package/install receipt proof.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The Mac+Android native carrier now emits package/install evidence around the live channel receipt: script/source/binary/channel SHA-256s, channel duration, sample window, device metadata, and remote cleanup.
public_endpoints: n/a: local authorized Android adb device and local Mac native binary
test_flows: Build macOS arm64 and Android arm64 binaries from one C source.
Push and run the Android executable one-shot.
Exchange the channel receipt over adb-forward TCP.
Emit package-latest.json with SHA-256 hashes and cleanup evidence.
Validate the package receipt shape four-way through fkwu.

phase_gate.gate: Package/install metadata must be visible before widening the native phone binary claim to signed distribution or non-adb transport.
phase_gate.next: Add APK/distribution signing or a non-adb mesh transport receipt with source-map provenance and timeout/RTT policy.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: PR #3174 established a live Mac+Android native channel receipt but package/install metadata was still a next-wall.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: core-axiom-package-receipt returns 4095 four-way, and package-latest.json records script/source/binary/channel hashes, channel duration, sample window, device metadata, and remote cleanup pass.
